svg.text: Distance metric families — applicability to your dataset
Recommended approach for your client segmentation
1. Normalise Age to [0–1] range first (others are already normalised)
2. Use Gower distance as primary — handles binary (Gender), ordinal (CitySize), and continuous
3. Consider dropping ID column entirely — carries no semantic meaning
4. Apply hierarchical or k-medoids clustering (not k-means — works with any distance matrix)
